title: pyrus yamatensis
intro: Pyrus yamatensis, also known as Japanese mountain apple or Yamatsumomo, is a species of wild apple tree native to Japan. It has been used in traditional Japanese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pyrus yamatensis include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and supporting digestive health. It is often prepared as a tea or taken in capsule form as an herbal supplement.
